productDisplayName: Puma Men Bow Blue Flip Flops
description: Look cool on the beach with this pair of Bow flip-flops from puma. The double coloured straps offer a snug Fit and the cushioned EVA footbed provides hours of comfort, coupled with great style. The outsole with the herringbone structured grooves enhances grip, making this an ideal casual wear. Upper Fabric upper offer dry comfort to the feet Thong straps with stitch detailing and padded inner Thong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and added comfort and style Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for in-step comfort Neon cat logo on the footbed Outsole TPR outsole with herringbone patterned ridges for great traction and grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
